_comment: Eyum TTRPG Generator Settings - Edit to match handbook changes

Jack of all Trades.description: Hybrid build with both physical and magical capabilities

Archer/Melee Fighter.description: DPS hybrid with both ranged and melee attacks

Tanker Archer.description: Tanky archer build with high survivability

Tanker.description: Tanky melee fighter with high survivability

Physical Fighter.description: Physical-focused jack of all trades without magic

Mage Jack of all Trades.description: All magics without any affinity preference

Martial Fighter.description: Unarmed melee fighter using Tull racial path

Generic.name: Mana Bomb
Generic.description: 3+Affinity damage to all in 10ft, Dex save negates.

Generic.name: Mana Explosion
Generic.description: 5+Affinity damage to all in 25ft, Dex save half.

Generic.name: Mana Decimation
Generic.description: 30+(Affinity*2) damage to all in 25ft, Dex save half.

Toughness.description: Gain +1 HP and +1 Vit per level (Retroactive).

Grappler.description: Advantage on Athletics checks to grapple.

Brawler.description: Unarmed strikes damage up a dice tier, up to 3 times.

Eagle Eye.description: See clearly up to 1 mile; +2 Search and Spot.

Mana Flow.description: Increase Max Mana by +2 per level (retroactive).

Spell Sniper.description: Double the range of your spells.

Careful Spells.description: Allies auto-pass saves against your AOE spells.

Affinity Master (Choose).description: Choose one Affinity; increase it by +3.

Chain Lightning.description: Lightning spells jump to 1 secondary target.

Holy Radiance.description: Undead take +1d6 from your Radiant spells.

Aura of Protection.description: Allies within 10ft gain +2 to all saves.

Skill Expert.description: Gain Proficiency in one skill and +1 Stat Point.

Medic.description: Expertise in Medicine and +3 to Medicine rolls.

Dungeon Delver.description: Advantage on trap finding; lesser resistance to trap damage.

Trader.description: Expertise in Barter and +3 to Barter rolls.

Acrobat.description: Half fall damage, proficiency in Acrobatics.

Darkness Seer.description: See through magical darkness up to 60ft.

Giant's Strength.description: Size one tier larger for carry/lift/grapple.

Cat's Grace.description: No damage from falls under 30ft; not knocked prone.

Eternal Mana.description: Below 10 mana gain 2 mana, once per 6s.

Titan's Grip.description: Hold two-handed weapon in one hand and dual wield.

Rounded Mage.description: Link two affinities of same amount.

Dodge Master.description: Max AC bonus from Dex raises by +3.

Armor Training.description: +3 AC heavy armor, +2 AC medium armor.

Point Blank Shot.description: No disadvantage on ranged attacks within 5ft.

Great Cleave.description: After kill, next attack this turn deals +3 damage.

Steady Aim.description: +2 Accuracy if you don't move this turn.

Mobile.description: No reactions from attacked target after melee.

Endurance.description: Drop to 1 HP instead of 0, once per combat.

Disarming Attack.description: Str Save or drop weapon on melee hit.

Trip Attack.description: Dex Save or fall prone on melee hit.

Vital Spot.description: +1d12 damage vs Prone or Restrained targets.

Executioner.description: Melee attacks vs <10% HP targets are always crits.

Save or Don't Suck.description: Spells deal half damage on save.

Firebrand.description: Fire spells cause On Fire condition (Con save).

Flowing Water.description: Move 5ft without reactions after Water spell.

Soul Reaper.description: Gain mana equal to half necrotic kill damage.

Static Discharge.description: After taking damage, next Lightning spell deals +1d6.

Infiltrator.description: Double advantage on Stealth in dim light.

1,000 Paper Cuts.description: +10 true damage vs 500+ max health creatures.

Apex Predator.description: First attack is guaranteed crit if first in initiative.

Defensive Duelist.description: Add Proficiency to AC vs one melee attack (Rp).

Sentinel.description: Attack creature that attacks ally within 5ft (Rp).

Parry.description: Reduce melee damage by Str/Dex mod (Rp).

Second Wind.description: Heal HP equal to Hit Dice once per combat (BAp).

Hunker Down.description: Skip turn for +6 AC (BAp, start of turn).

Elemental Shield.description: Gain resistance to a damage type you have 5+ affinity in (BAp).

Arcane Overload.description: Next spell deals max damage, take 1d10 true (BAp).

Divinely Favored.description: Reroll one d20 once per long rest (BAp).

Overdrive.description: +1 AP next turn, lose all BAp for 2 turns (BAp).

Demonic Bargain.description: Sacrifice 10 Vit or 5 HP for 20 Mana (BAp).

Mana Burn.description: Force damage equal to half target's mana (Ap).

Twin Cast.description: Double mana to hit two targets with single-target spell.
